subcodes.first_line: O Ali! By the fire of separation from Thee have the hearts of them that are nigh been consumed, and through Thy remoteness have the eyes of the dwellers in the cities wept [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی من نار فراقک احترقت افئده المقربین و من هجرک بکت عیون اهل مداین
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @law of pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @pain of love; love as veil, @nearness and remoteness
